title: Raghav Chadha news Live Updates: Chadha, Ashok Mittal, Sandeep Pathak reach BJP headquarters
description: Raghav Chadha news Live Updates: Rajya Sabha MPs Raghav Chadha, Ashok Mittal, Sandeep Pathak, Harbhajan Singh, Rajinder Gupta, Vikram Sahney and Swati Maliwal will merge with the BJP. Stay tuned to this LIVE blog for all the latest updates on the developments.
